entries.text: %null%
%null%
%null%
%null%
Maximum HP raised
Maximum FP raised
Maximum stamina raised
Maximum HP raised
Maximum stamina raised
Raises likelihood of item discovery
Increases runes obtained from defeated enemies
Raises stamina recovery speed
Raises resistance to blood loss
Raises resistance to frost
Raises resistance to poison
Raises resistance to scarlet rot
Raises resistance to sleep
Raises resistance to madness
Raises resistance to death blight
Raises resistance to poison and scarlet rot
Raises resistance to blood loss and frost
Raises resistance to sleep and madness
Raises poise
Raises attack power of skills
Raises dexterity
Raises attack power when striking enemies with successive attacks
Raises magic attack
Increases physical damage taken
Raises lightning attack
Increases physical damage taken
Raises fire attack
Increases physical damage taken
Raises holy attack
Increases physical damage taken
Raises attack power when HP is low
Raises attack power when HP is at maximum
Enhances counterattacks unique to thrusting weapons
Enhances stamina-reducing attacks against blockers
Raises attack power with successive attacks
Enhances critical hits
Reduces damage drop-off for projectiles traveling long distances
Enhances final hit of chain attacks
Enhances charge attacks
Raises attack power of arrows and bolts
Blood loss in vicinity increases attack power
Poisoning or scarlet rot in vicinity increases attack power
Enhances jump attacks
Enhances roars and breath attacks
Enhances guard counters
Raises potency of throwing pots
Raises potency of items employing perfume
Raises potency of sorceries
Raises potency of incantations
Extends spell effect duration
Shortens spell casting time
Spells consume less FP
Maximum HP reduced
Enhances charged spells and skills
Boosts physical damage negation
Boosts magical damage negation
Boosts fire damage negation
Boosts lightning damage negation
Boosts holy damage negation
Boosts magic, fire, lightning, and holy damage negation
Longer invincibility windows during evasive maneuvers
Increases damage taken
Boosts damage negation when HP is low
Boosts damage negation when HP is at maximum
Boosts guarding ability
Boosts HP restoration from flasks
Slowly restores HP
Restores HP upon defeating enemies
Successive attacks restore HP
Critical hits restore HP
Critical hits restore FP
Lowers FP consumed by skills
Upon death no runes are lost and levelling down does not occur
Restores FP upon defeating enemies
Raises likelihood of item discovery
Increases runes obtained from defeated enemies
Slowly lowers HP
Lowers maximum HP
Lowers maximum FP
Lowers maximum stamina
Reduced ability to block physical damage
Lowers magic, fire, lightning, and holy damage negation
Lowers resistance to all ailments
Lowers HP restoration from flasks
Surge sprinting consumes more stamina
Slows the charging speed of Ultimate Art gauge
Slowly lowers HP
Evasions consume more stamina
Receive more damage just after evading
Evading repeatedly impairs damage negation
Using flask reduces damage negation
Using flask causes sleep buildup
Using flask causes madness buildup
Attack power reduced when below max HP
Slower charging of Ultimate Art when below max HP level
Maximum HP raised
Maximum FP raised
Lowers FP consumption
Maximum stamina raised
Lowers stamina consumption
Raises stamina recovery speed
Raises physical attack
Raises magic attack
Raises fire attack
Raises lightning attack
Raises holy attack
Attacks cause poison buildup
Attacks cause blood loss buildup
Attacks cause sleep buildup
Attacks cause death buildup
Attacks cause scarlet rot buildup
Attacks cause frost buildup
Attacks cause madness buildup
Partially changes weapon's affinity to fire
Partially changes weapon's affinity to magic
Partially changes weapon's affinity to lightning
Partially changes weapon's affinity to holy
Attacks more likely to break stance of enemies
Enhances critical hits
Enhances stamina-reducing attacks against blockers
Enhances attacks against lifeforms born of falling stars
Enhances attacks against Those Who Live in Death
Enhances attacks against dragons
Boosts physical damage negation
Boosts magical damage negation
Boosts fire damage negation
Boosts lightning damage negation
Boosts holy damage negation
Boosts magic, fire, lightning, and holy damage negation
Raises resistance to poison
Raises resistance to blood loss
Raises resistance to sleep
Raises resistance to death blight
Raises resistance to scarlet rot
Raises resistance to frost
Raises resistance to madness
Boosts guarding ability
Greatly boosts guarding ability
Vastly boosts guarding ability
Raises poise
Enhances attacks with two-handed weapons
Attacks more capable of breaking enemy stance when two-handing armament
Enhances left-handed light attacks when wielding two swords
Attacks more capable of breaking enemy stance when wielding two armaments
Enhances final hit of chain attacks
Enhances charge attacks
Enhances poise during strong attacks
Enhances jump attacks
Boosts damage negation upon landing charge attacks
Raises potency of sorceries
Raises potency of incantations
Enhances charged sorceries
Enhances charged incantations
Shortens spell casting time
Extends spell effect duration
Lowers FP consumed by sorceries and incantations
Dragon Communion incantations add anti-dragon effect to right hand armament
Boosts damage negation while casting sorceries and incantations
Raises attack power of arrows and bolts
Reduces damage drop-off for projectiles traveling long distances
Raises attack power of skills
Enhances charged skills
Lowers FP consumed by skills
Enhances poise during skill activation
Parry to dispel incoming sorceries and incantations, retaliating with golden power
奥義ゲージのチャージ速度が向上する
Shortens Character Skill cooldown time
Enhances roars and breath attacks
Raises potency of throwing pots
Raises potency of items employing perfume
Longer invincibility windows during evasive maneuvers
Evasive maneuvers strike surroundings with lightning
Enhances guard counters
Guard counters trigger holy bursts
Guard counters summon a group of Those Lost in Death that attack enemies
Enhances counterattacks unique to thrusting weapons
Boosts HP restoration from flasks
Flask restores HP to self and nearby allies
Flask slowly restores HP and provides increased HP restoration
Produces magma at the starting point of surge sprint
Produces ice storm at the starting point of surge sprint
Become difficult to spot and silence footsteps while walking
Pillars of flame rise one after another around the caster while walking
Causes the yellow flame of frenzy to violently burst forth while walking
Unleashes wraiths that chase down foes while walking
Summons a dark cloud of stars overhead while walking. The cloud will release a violent deluge of star rain.
Walking calls red lightning which strikes the vicinity
Increases runes obtained from defeated enemies
Raises likelihood of item discovery
Enemies become likely to attack nearby allies
Creates glintblades which automatically attack nearby foes at regular intervals
Creates glintblades which automatically attack nearby foes at regular intervals
Creates glintblades which automatically attack nearby foes at regular intervals
Slowly restores HP
Restores HP upon attacking enemies
Restores FP upon attacking enemies
On rare occasions, attacked enemies die instantly
Successive attacks restore HP
Successive attacks restore FP
Raises attack power with successive attacks
Hitting an enemy with a charged attack triggers a magic attack
Hitting an enemy with a charged attack triggers a fire attack
Hitting an enemy with a charged attack triggers a lightning attack
Hitting an enemy with a charged attack triggers a holy attack
Successive attacks boost damage negation once
Restores FP upon receiving damage
Boosts damage negation upon receiving damage
Restores HP upon defeating enemies
Restores FP upon defeating enemies
Attacks have a chance to unleash wraiths that chase down foes
Attacks have a chance to produce a mist that charms enemies
Attacks have a chance to summon vengeful spirits that chase down foes
Attacks have a chance to generate roiling lava
Attacks have a chance to release a mist of frost
Attacks have a chance to unleash a bolt of lightning
Attacks have a chance to generate golden shockwaves
Critical hits restore HP
Critical hits restore FP
Critical hits increase damage inflicted upon enemies
Critical hits with holy affinity create an image of Order
Critical hits with fire affinity spawn roiling lava
Critical hits with lightning affinity call down a bolt of lightning into armament
Critical hits with magic affinity create crystal shards
Critical hits with poison release poison mist
Critical hits with blood loss summon thorns of blood
Critical hits with scarlet rot release pest threads
Critical hits with frost cause an ice storm
Critical hits with madness launch a flame of frenzy
Critical hits with death blight strike surroundings with death lightning
Successful guards restore HP
Successful guards restore FP
Successful guarding enhances poise
Successful guarding enhances damage negation
Raises attack power when HP is low
Boosts damage negation when HP is low
武器の攻撃でクリティカルヒット時に出血状態を付与する
At low HP, create holy ground, slowly restore HP, and improve damage negation
Critical hits restore all HP when HP is low
Raises attack power when HP is at maximum
Boosts damage negation when HP is at maximum
Creates a mist of poison when struck with poison
Unleashes a concentrated blast of Frenzied Flame from the eyes when struck with madness
Creates rot-inducing mist when struck with scarlet rot
Launches a mist of frost when struck with frost
Creates sleep-inducing mist when struck with sleep
Increases attack power when struck with poison
Increases attack power when struck with blood loss
Increases attack power when struck with sleep
Increases attack power when struck with frost
Increases attack power when struck with madness
Lowers maximum HP
Lowers maximum FP
Lowers maximum stamina
Increases physical damage taken
Lowers magic, fire, lightning, and holy damage negation
Lowers resistance to all ailments
Lowers HP restoration from flasks
Surge sprinting consumes more stamina
Reduces the charging speed of Ultimate Art gauge
Slowly lowers HP
More damage taken from the Night's tide
As each day draws to its end, damage taken increases
Evasions consume more stamina
回避直後に受けるダメージが増加する
Evading repeatedly impairs damage negation
Using flask reduces damage negation
Using flask causes sleep buildup
Using flask causes madness buildup
Attack power reduced when below max HP
Reduced Ultimate Art gain when below max HP
Poison builds up when below max HP
Rot builds up when below max HP
Attack power reduced at max HP
Reduced Ultimate Art gain at max HP
Damage negation reduced at lower stamina
On rare occasions, attacks do less damage
Landed attacks afflict self with frost buildup
Landed attacks afflict self with blood loss buildup
Increases damage taken from ailments
Nearing death partly depletes Art gauge
Nearing death reduces flask by one
Nearing death reduces max HP for some time
衝撃攻撃で氷嵐を発生させる
Charged slash produces a ring of light
衝撃攻撃で黒炎を発生させる
Charge attacks trigger phantom attack
Charged slash produces roaring flames
衝撃攻撃で金色の衝撃波を発生させる
Charged strike produces magic projectiles
Charge attacks pull in enemies
Charged strike produces a shockwave
Charged strike triggers phantom attack
衝撃攻撃でマグマを発生させる
Charged strike produces magic bubbles
Charged thrust triggers phantom attack
衝撃攻撃で雷撃を発生させる
Charged thrust releases acid mist
Charged thrust releases pest threads
Charged thrust releases poison mist
衝撃攻撃で眠りを誘う霧を発生させる
Charge attacks create projectiles that inflict follow-up attacks
Precision-aimed shot produces a bolt of lightning from the point of impact
Precision-aimed shot produces poison mist from the point of impact
Precision-aimed shot produces rot-inducing mist from the point of impact
Precision-aimed shot releases a swarm of bloodflies from the point of impact
Increases damage negation for magic, fire, lightning, holy, and ailments by keeping shield held up
Become invincible for a moment by keeping shield held up
Slowly restores HP by keeping shield held up and creates a holy ground that enhances damage negation
Activates Endure to boost poise and damage negation when stance is broken
Using flask also restores FP
Failing in casting spell restores FP when FP is insufficient
継続ガードにより魔術と祈りの威力と詠唱速度が上昇する
Enhances attack power of magic, fire, lightning, and holy affinities
Critical hits raise attack power
Strong attacks change to a different attack
Strong jump attacks produce a shockwave at the landing point
Skill activation adds attack power of magic or fire affinities
Attacks lower enemies' magic damage negation
Charge attacks produce waves of light
Restores HP upon defeating enemies
Raises attack power upon defeating enemies
Charge attacks heal all ailments and dispel all temporary effects
Attacking also wears down enemy HP for a moment afterwards
The first blow of consecutive attacks creates a gravitational wave that pulls in enemies when wielding two swords
Charge attacks cause a wave of gravitational force
Enhances all attributes upon defeating enemies. This effect accumulates.
Strong jump attacks transform the wielder into a thundercloud that plunges down with a lightning-infused blade
Chance to instantly kill enemies attacked
Critical hits produce a burst of flame
Attacks after receiving damage partially recover HP
Charge attacks cause a holy shockwave
Restores HP upon defeating enemies
Attacks send forth a dark cloud of stars on rare occasions that lingers briefly before exploding
Charge attacks cause an earth-shaking shockwave
Attacks lower enemies' damage negation on rare occasions
Charged Skill activation adds attack power of lightning
Blood loss in vicinity increases attack power
Skill activation calls forth a barrage of flame pillars
Critical hits make the dragon spew flames
Charge attacks enhance attack power
Casting spells dispel incoming sorceries, using their power to retaliate with glintblades
Strong attack fires off a bundle of arrows
The Wylder's grief enhances strength and dexterity
The Guardian's grief enhances maximum HP and stamina
The Ironeye's grief enhances maximum stamina and dexterity
The Duchess' grief enhances dexterity and intelligence
The Raider's grief enhances maximum HP and strength
The Revenant's grief enhances faith and arcane
The Recluse's grief enhances maximum FP and intelligence
The Executor's grief enhances dexterity and arcane
Raises maximum HP
Raises maximum FP
Lowers FP consumption
Raises maximum stamina
Raises stamina recovery speed
Raises physical attack
Enhances attack power of magic, fire, lightning, and holy affinities
Attacks more likely to break stance of enemies
Boosts physical damage negation
Boosts magic, fire, lightning, and holy damage negation
Raises resistance to all ailments
Raises poise
Raises potency of sorceries and incantations
Extends spell effect duration
Dragon Communion incantations add anti-dragon effect to right hand armament
Parry to dispel incoming sorceries and incantations, retaliating with golden power
Guard counters trigger holy bursts
Activation summons a group of Those Lost in Death that attack enemies
Enhances counterattacks unique to thrusting weapons
Boosts HP restoration from flasks
Increases number of runes obtained
Critical hits restore HP
Critical hits restore FP
Critical hits increase damage inflicted upon enemies
Successful guards restore HP
Successful guards restore FP
Armament inflicts blood loss after performing a critical hit
At low HP, create holy ground, slowly restore HP, and improve defense
Poisoning or scarlet rot in vicinity continuously restores HP
Blood loss in vicinity increases attack power
